title: T-025 — ROOT: FA planning/commercial tabs group (MRP + Procurement + Commercial + Planning)
prompt:
# T-025 — FA planning/commercial tabs group (root/workflow descriptor)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §5.4-§5.9 + UX fa_mrp_tab/fa_procurement_tab/fa_commercial_tab/fa_planning_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx (Planning 537-557, Commercial 559-586, MRP 763-804, Procurement 806-838)

## Goal (root)
This is a ROOT/WORKFLOW descriptor — it is NOT executable on its own. It describes the FA detail planning/commercial tabs group at route `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]` and enumerates the atomic slice tasks that implement each tab plus the wiring and parity tasks that finalize the group.

## Shared route
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/page.tsx` — FA detail page hosting the tabs
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/` — tab implementations (one file per tab)
- Shared FA data (fa entity, closed_* flags, blocking rules) flows from the page into each tab as props

## Slices under this root
- **T-101** — FA MRP tab (`fa_mrp_tab`, fa-screens.jsx:763-804): 12 material fields with D365 found/nocost/missing status badges; cell() helper → D365StatusInput component
- **T-102** — FA Procurement tab (`fa_procurement_tab`, fa-screens.jsx:806-838): 4 fields with price gating (V-NPD-PROC-001) when Core OR Production not closed
- **T-103** — FA Commercial tab (`fa_commercial_tab`, fa-screens.jsx:559-586): 7 fields incl. Launch Date with V08 (≥24 weeks from Brief handoff) rule
- **T-104** — FA Planning tab (`fa_planning_tab`, fa-screens.jsx:537-557): 3 fields (Meat %, Runs/week, Date codes/week) + Technical BOM v1 transition note

## Wiring & parity
- **T-105** — WIRING: wire all 4 tabs into FA detail page + tabs nav, ensure shared FA data flows correctly, tab switching has no console errors
- **T-106** — PARITY: Playwright browser screenshot parity vs prototype for all 4 tabs (structural + visual + interaction + data parity, 0 axe violations)

## How to use this root
Do not implement code from this task. Instead, dispatch the slice tasks T-101..T-104 (parallel-safe with each other), then T-105 (wiring), then T-106 (parity). Each slice has a narrow `scope_files` and references its prototype range.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement any tab UI in this root task
- Do not bypass blocking rules (V-NPD-PROC-001, V08, Core gate on Planning/Commercial)
- Do not duplicate field definitions (use buildDeptZod + DeptColumns reference)

pipeline_inputs.description: Root/workflow descriptor for the FA planning/commercial tabs group. Enumerates 4 slice tasks (T-101..T-104) + wiring (T-105) + parity (T-106).
pipeline_inputs.details: ROOT task — not executable. Describes shared route `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]` and lists slices: T-101 MRP, T-102 Procurement, T-103 Commercial, T-104 Planning, T-105 wiring, T-106 parity.
acceptance_criteria: This task is a root/workflow descriptor and is closed when all child slices T-101..T-106 are closed with their own ACs satisfied.
All 4 tabs (MRP, Procurement, Commercial, Planning) render under apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id] with correct order, working tab switching, and shared FA data — verified by T-105 wiring task.
Browser screenshot parity vs prototype is recorded by T-106 parity task with 0 axe violations.
test_strategy: No tests at root level — each slice (T-101..T-104) has its own RTL tests, T-105 has wiring tests, T-106 runs Playwright parity.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement any tab UI in this root task
